data.title: Ferrari N.V. purchased Euro 250 million of common shares in the first tranche of their buyback program. #Ferrari #RACE
data.description: In Maranello, Italy, on January 19, 2026, Ferrari N.V. (NYSE/EXM: RACE) has disclosed the purchase of Euro 250 million worth of common shares under the share buyback program initiated on December 16, 2025. This initial investment is part of a larger plan to repurchase approximately Euro 3.5 billion in shares by 2030, as outlined during the 2025 Capital Markets Day. The company will continue to buy back shares on Euronext Milan (EXM) on a daily basis as part of this ongoing program.

data.title: VIVOTEK enhances security in PathCare's laboratories in South Africa, improving staff and patient safety.
data.description: In Taipei on January 19, 2026, VIVOTEK announced the successful implementation of a cutting-edge security system in all of PathCare's pathology laboratories throughout South Africa. This new solution aims to improve safety for both staff and patients, enhance the safeguarding of valuable medical resources, and ensure...

data.title: Veterinary Vaccines Market to reach $18.46 billion by 2031, growing at 7.2% CAGR.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 19, 2026, it was reported that the Veterinary Vaccines Market is anticipated to increase from approximately USD 13.02 billion in 2026 to USD 18.46 billion by 2031, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.2%. The market data includes 302 tables and 60 figures spread across 450 sources, as per MarketsandMarkets™ projections.

data.title: Alexa Translations strengthens UAE presence with legal partnerships and Trade Mission participation. Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: Chosen as one of three Canadian firms to join Minister Sidhu's UAE Trade Mission in Dubai on January 19, 2026, Alexa Translations, a prominent provider of AI-driven language services, is solidifying its footprint in the area. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to expanding its reach and impact.
